channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Betts and Ohtani help the Dodgers stay alive in NLDS with 8-0 win vs the Padres
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — Mookie Betts homered for the second straight night, Shohei Ohtani hit an RBI single and the Los Angeles Dodgers beat Dylan Cease and the San Diego Padres 8-0 on Wednesday night to force a deciding Game 5 in their tense NL Division Series.
item.dc:creator: BERNIE WILSON, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Giancarlo Stanton hits go-ahead homer in the eighth, Yankees beat Royals 3-2 in Game 3 of the ALDS
item.description: Giancarlo Stanton hit a go-ahead homer in the eighth inning, and the New York Yankees beat the Kansas City Royals 3-2 in Game 3 of their AL Division Series at Kauffman Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Dave Skretta, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Lions' Dan Campbell hilariously recalls moment when player punched him as he walked through team headquarters
item.description: Detroit Lions star center Frank Ragnow was injured during a game in September, but he appeared to be eager to prove to his head coach he was ready to return to action.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Francisco Lindor's grand slam sends Mets into NLCS with 4-1 win over Phillies in Game 4 of NLDS
item.description: Francisco Lindor hit a grand slam in the sixth inning, his latest clutch swing in a storybook season, and the New York Mets reached the National League Championship Series with a 4-1 victory over the Philadelphia Phillies.
item.dc:creator: Mike Fitzpatrick, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Dodgers turn to Brasier to start NLDS Game 4 vs Padres as they try to stave off elimination
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — The Los Angeles Dodgers are going with reliever Ryan Brasier as their starter for Game 4 against the San Diego Padres on Wednesday night as they try to avoid elimination in their NL Division Series. Manager Dave Roberts said Tuesday that the Dodgers would go with a bullpen game.
item.dc:creator: BERNIE WILSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: LeBron James meets 'lifesaver' who performed CPR on son Bronny
item.description: In an emotional moment, LeBron James recently met the "lifesaver" who performed CPR on his son, Bronny, after he went into cardiac arrest.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 2 teams suing NASCAR ask court to recognize them as chartered while antitrust case proceeds
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — The two teams suing NASCAR asked a judge for a preliminary injunction Wednesday so they can compete next season under the charter system they are challenging as their antitrust case moves through federal court.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Melania Trump speaks out against transgenders in women's sports: 'Seeing that dream collapse'
item.description: Former first lady Melania Trump spoke out against transgender inclusion in women's sports in an excerpt of her new memoir, calling it "unfair.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Milton damages the roof of the Rays' stadium and forces NBA preseason game to be called off
item.description: The fabric roof over the home of baseball’s Tampa Bay Rays was ripped to shreds after Hurricane Milton came ashore in Florida, bringing wind gusts exceeding 100 mph and flooding parts of the state.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Making way for the A’s: Las Vegas blows a kiss goodbye — literally — to the Tropicana with a flashy casino implosion
item.description: the implosion cleared land for a $1.5 billion baseball stadium for the relocating Oakland Athletics, part of the city’s latest rebrand into a sports hub.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Mets postseason tickets outsell Yankees on StubHub
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – The Mets and Yankees are both looking to make a run this postseason, but the Amazins are selling more tickets than the Bronx Bombers, according to StubHub. The Mets-Phillies National League Division Series was the best-selling series of the 2024 postseason on StubHub.
item.dc:creator: Erin Pflaumer, PIX 11

item.title: Patriots safety Jabrill Peppers is placed on commissioner's exempt list after his arrest
item.description: FOXBOROUGH, Mass. (AP) — The NFL has placed New England Patriots safety Jabrill Peppers on the exempt list while he goes through the legal process following his arrest on charges that he shoved his girlfriend’s head into the wall and choked her.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Santa Cruz Warriors reveals head coach Nicholas Kerr’s 2024-25 staff
item.description: The Santa Cruz Warriors revealed second-year Head Coach Nicholas Kerr's staff for the 2024-25 NBA G League season on Tuesday. Hilton Armstrong and Ben Stelzer have both been named assistant coaches.
item.dc:creator: Sentinel Staff Report, The Mercury News

item.title: Jeff Ulbrich was a gritty player, a respected assistant and now takes over a struggling Jets team
item.description: Jeff Ulbrich was in the middle of putting together the game plan for the New York Jets' defense when he got the news that stunned him — and the rest of the NFL. Robert Saleh was out as the head coach. And Ulbrich was taking over for the rest of the season.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah HC beats Chicago in historic opener, 5-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was an historic day with a memorable ending. The Utah Hockey Club never trailed after getting first-period goals from Dylan Guenther and Clayton Keller and held off a late rally to beat the Chicago Blackhawks 5-2 in the season opener for both teams on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Lynx return to finals with 88-77 win over Sun in Game 5 behind Collier's 27 points, 11 rebounds
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — The Minnesota Lynx are three wins from a fifth championship, chasing a league record with an entirely different core from the previous dynasty. Napheesa Collier is fully in charge of this group.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hurricane Milton forces Bucs and Lightning to leave Florida early and other teams to alter games
item.description: The NFL's Tampa Bay Buccaneers and NHL's Tampa Bay Lightning have left Florida ahead of Hurricane Milton to practice the rest of the week. The Bucs departed Tuesday, relocating to New Orleans, where they'll face the Saints on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Where to watch Padres vs. Dodgers NLDS Game 3
item.description: The San Diego Padres and the Los Angeles Dodgers will meet again in Game 3 of the best-of-five National League Division Series Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Jets fire head coach Robert Saleh after a 2-3 start to the season, AP source says
item.description: The New York Jets have fired head coach Robert Saleh after the team's 2-3 start in his fourth season, a person familiar with the decision told The Associated Press. Saleh was 20-36 as coach of the Jets, who are trying to snap the NFL's longest active playoff drought at 13 seasons.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Castellanos wins Game 2 for Phillies with 9th-inning single, top Mets 7-6
item.description: Castellanos, who led the major leagues this season with four walk-off hits, tossed his helmet and was mobbed by teammates on the infield as a game that seemed to slip away one inning earlier turned into one more comeback for the NL East champions.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: What is rhabdo? How intense workouts could seriously hurt you
item.description: A dozen Tufts University men’s lacrosse players were diagnosed with the rare muscle injury in September.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Lightning preseason game against Nashville canceled
item.description: The Tampa Bay Lightning preseason game scheduled for Monday against the Nashville Predators has been canceled due to Hurricane Milton, the team announced Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Kevin Accettulla, WFLA, NBC

item.title: The Big Sho: Ohtani hits tying 3-run homer in playoff debut for the Los Angeles Dodgers in NLDS win
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani rewrote the record book during his first season with the Los Angeles Dodgers. Now, he's getting a chance to make more history in his highly anticipated playoff debut.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Real Salt Lake ready for road test: Unbeaten streak at stake against San Jose Earthquakes
item.description: Real Salt Lake (4th place Western Conference, 53 points) kept a clean sheet at home against Minnesota on Wednesday and now head back on the road with a four-match unbeaten streak to face the San Jose Earthquakes (14th place, Western Conference, 21 points) on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4

item.title: Ludmila scores in third straight game as Chicago Red Stars down Houston Dash 2-0
item.description: Ludmila scored a goal and earned a penalty shot as the Chicago Red Stars beat the Houston Dash 2-0 on Friday night at Shell Energy Stadium. Ludmila headed in Mallory Pugh's free kick in the 8th minute to get things started. It was the third straight game she had scored a goal.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bronny James begins his Lakers career with a preseason debut. LeBron won't join until the next game
item.description: PALM DESERT, Calif. (AP) — Bronny James played in his first NBA preseason game Friday night, but LeBron James wasn't in uniform with him when the Lakers hosted Minnesota in the first of Los Angeles' two weekend games in the Coachella Valley.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Grand Junction softball pours it on Palisade for big league win
item.description: With a clear blue sky and beautiful Mt. Garfield as the backdrop at Palisade High School, it was the Grand Junction Tigers show on the softball field.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Utah State Volleyball cancels match against San Jose State, becomes fourth team to do so
item.description: The Utah State women's volleyball team has canceled their Oct. 23 match against San Jose State becoming the fourth team this year to do so, according to reports and tweets from state officials. This comes amid a swirling controversy over a SJSU player's gender.
item.dc:creator: Spencer Mahon, ABC 4
